column1: Otto Lopez leads the slate with a strong track record of consistency, hitting safely in over 86% of his games and enjoying the leadoff spot at home with a favorable platoon advantage. Bo Bichette also offers reliability atop the order in a hitter-friendly park, facing a lefty he matches up well against. Ildemaro Vargas brings a steady recent stretch and a favorable matchup if looking to dig deeper. All three are positioned for success, but Lopez stands out for Beat The Streak.
